* Added by [William Bruce](https://northeastwheelsevents.com/profile/WilliamBruce)
* [View Events](https://northeastwheelsevents.com/events/event/listUserEvents?user=1600p4resu6sx)

## Event Description
Get ready, Save the date! “AutoWeen” Sunday, October 20th, 2024 👻🎃
As you all know, we hosted AutoWeen back in October of 2022, well, we’re pleased to announce THAT IT IS BACK!
Hosted at the one and only location, Macungie Memorial Park! This location features a 42 acre community park located in the heart of Macungie, Pennsylvania. The park hosts events throughout the year, including classic car shows, food trucks nights, farmers markets, and more. We’re looking to FULLY PACK OUT THE PARK!
Ticket & Vehicle Registration info here -<https://tickets.thefoat.com/BringThemOutCarMeets/event-244932/clear_cart-1>
Mark your calendars, this halloween car event is going to be one for the books 👹
What To Expect? 👀
Car Show ✅
Live Bands/Dj ✅
Vendors ✅
Models ✅
Food/Beer Trucks✅
Halloween/Costume Contest ✅
Low Car Limbo ✅
2 Step Battle ✅
Awards/Trophies ✅
Good Vibes ✅
🗓️ Sunday, October 20th, 2024
🏎️ Vehicle/Vendor Roll in 10:00am-12:30pm
⏱️ Show Time 1:00pm-5:00pm
📍Location - Macungie Memorial Park, 50 N Poplar St, Macungie, Pa 18062
We will be accepting tickets at the gate upon entry the day of the event! But we highly suggest you pre-register to lock in your show spot.
Pre-Registered Vehicle Flyers will be sent out via email after Acceptance.
If attending as a club, group, or team, please email us for a group discount code. Also, we ask you all pull in together so we can park you together. There will be no saving spots due to staging/roll in time reasons.
If your brand, business, or club is interested in being a vendor or a sponsor for AutoWeen 2024 Season Closer, Please email us all serious inquiries at[bringthemoutcarmeets@gmail.com](https://allevents.in/macungie/autoween-2024-season-closer/200027319643320)
DAY OF SHOW - CASH ONLY AT THE GATE IF YOU ARE NOT PRE-REGISTERED! Or PRE-REGISTER HERE -<https://tickets.thefoat.com/BringThemOutCarMeets/event-244932/clear_cart-1>
This event is also in collaboration with Trick or Truck Or Treat in the park!
listed here - Events By Jennifer Lynn & Company LLC -<https://facebook.com/events/s/trick-or-trunk-or-treat-in-the/6994280684032447/>
Don’t forget to #BringThemOut 😈 #AutoWeen2024 #TrickorTrunkorTreat
